On my side the profile shows the new email correctly, so I’m confused about whether the account change actually went through.

comments.message: The user is Maria Jensen. I updated her address from maria@old-domain.com to maria@new-domain.com in Admin > Users around two hours ago. Since then she gets “user not found” on login, and resets to the new address never show up.

It sounds like the email change didn’t fully propagate. As a quick troubleshooting step, can you have Maria try signing in with the old email one more time and use an incognito window? Also check whether your mail server is filtering our reset emails from no-reply@app.example.com.
Incognito didn’t help. Old email says invalid credentials, new email says user not found, and nothing is quarantined on our mail side.

I found the issue: the email update is saved on the profile record, but the login identity index is still pointing to the old address. I’ve rebuilt that mapping and triggered a fresh password reset to maria@new-domain.com. She should now be able to sign in with the new email within the next few minutes.

subject: Annual renewal charged before data purge completed
description: We submitted a request to purge former employee records before our annual renewal because we were trying to get under the next pricing threshold. The purge ticket was marked complete, but the records are still visible in exports and our renewal invoice charged us at the higher tier. I need to know whether the purge actually ran and what can be done about the invoice if the count was wrong at renewal time.

comments.message: We were billed at the higher annual tier even though we requested a data purge beforehand. The records still appear in exports, so I don't think the purge completed. Can this be corrected?

I reviewed the account and I see the renewal invoice finalized before the storage and record-count recalculation completed. The purge request itself shows as successful in one subsystem, but your export example suggests the deletion did not propagate to the analytics store. I've escalated the data discrepancy to our platform team and opened a billing review tied to the renewal.
Does that mean we'll have to wait a full year for the pricing correction?

Not necessarily. If the escalation confirms the purge should have reduced you below the threshold before renewal, billing can issue a prorated adjustment or amended contract charge. I can't finalize that from support, but the case is now with our renewal billing specialists and data platform engineers together.

subject: Je n’arrive pas à transférer mon compte vers une autre filiale
description: Je travaille désormais pour une autre filiale de notre groupe et on m’a demandé de déplacer mon compte utilisateur vers leur espace, en gardant mon adresse e-mail et si possible mes accès existants. Quand j’accepte l’invitation de la nouvelle filiale, j’obtiens un message indiquant que mon compte est déjà rattaché à une autre organisation. Je ne sais pas si vous pouvez faire le transfert de votre côté.

comments.message: Bonjour, pouvez-vous déplacer mon compte de l’espace Groupe Sorel France vers Groupe Sorel Benelux sans changer mon e-mail ? J’ai besoin d’accéder au nouvel espace cette semaine.

Bonjour, merci pour votre message. Nous ne pouvons pas déplacer directement un utilisateur entre deux organisations lorsque l’adresse e-mail est déjà active dans l’une d’elles. Deux options existent généralement : supprimer l’utilisateur de l’ancienne organisation puis l’inviter dans la nouvelle, ou créer provisoirement un second identifiant. Voulez-vous conserver des données personnelles de l’ancien espace, comme des tableaux de bord ou favoris ?
Oui, j’aimerais au moins garder mes favoris, sinon ce sera très pénalisant.

Dans ce cas, je préfère ne pas vous faire supprimer le compte tout de suite. J’escalade la demande à notre équipe de gestion des comptes pour confirmer si un transfert assisté de profil est possible entre filiales liées. Vous recevrez un retour sous 1 jour ouvré. En attendant, je peux demander l’ouverture d’un accès temporaire sur le nouvel espace avec une adresse alias si c’est urgent.

subject: Les nouveaux utilisateurs ne reçoivent pas le bon parcours d'accueil
description: J'ai configuré un parcours d'accueil différent pour les administrateurs et pour les agents, mais tous les nouveaux utilisateurs reçoivent la même série d'emails et la même checklist. Je prépare le déploiement pour lundi et j'ai besoin de comprendre le paramétrage pour l'expliquer à mes responsables locaux.

comments.message: Bonjour, nous avons deux profils principaux : administrateur local et agent. J'ai créé deux parcours d'onboarding avec des contenus différents, y compris des guides de formation. Pourtant, lors de mes tests, tout le monde reçoit le parcours “Agent”. Où faut-il lier cela exactement ?

Bonjour, merci pour les détails. Dans notre plateforme, les parcours d'accueil ne se lient pas seulement au rôle ; ils peuvent aussi dépendre de la méthode d'invitation. Vérifiez dans Paramètres > Onboarding > Règles d'attribution si votre règle “Agent” est placée avant celle des administrateurs. Si une règle plus large correspond d'abord, elle prend le dessus.
Je viens de voir que la règle Agent s'applique à “tous les utilisateurs actifs”. Donc elle capture aussi les admins. Si je la restreins au rôle Agent uniquement, est-ce suffisant ?

Oui, c'est la bonne correction. Je vous recommande : 1) créer une règle “Administrateur local” en premier, basée sur le rôle, 2) limiter la règle “Agent” au rôle Agent, 3) relancer un test d'invitation avec une adresse différente. Pour votre présentation interne, vous pouvez expliquer à vos responsables qu'il faut toujours structurer les règles du plus spécifique au plus général. Cela évite que les parcours de formation se chevauchent.

subject: La integración con HubSpot crea contactos duplicados
description: Configuré la integración con HubSpot para que los contactos se creen automáticamente cuando entran por nuestros formularios, pero se están generando duplicados cada vez que un usuario actualiza su información. Revisé la configuración básica, aunque no tengo claro si el problema está en la regla de coincidencia o en cómo quedó configurado el identificador principal dentro del producto.

comments.message: Cada vez que un contacto existente completa nuevamente un formulario, en vez de actualizarse se crea otro registro en HubSpot. Ahora tenemos varios duplicados con el mismo correo.
Eso suele pasar cuando la integración está configurada en modo "crear siempre". Revise en Integraciones > HubSpot si puede cambiar la acción a "actualizar registros existentes".
No veo ninguna opción con ese nombre. Solo tengo una sección de mapeo y otra de reglas avanzadas.

Gracias. Entonces revise en Configuración > Clientes si el campo email está marcado como identificador único en su espacio de trabajo. Si no lo está, nuestra plataforma no sabrá que debe hacer upsert al enviar datos a HubSpot. Después, en reglas avanzadas de la integración, active la opción de usar email como clave de coincidencia. Si sigue duplicando, tendríamos que revisar si HubSpot tiene desactivada la deduplicación por correo.

subject: Service account conversion removed API access but didn’t change role
description: I tried converting one of our old user accounts into a service account so our integration would stop counting against a paid seat. The wizard completed, but the account still appears as a standard member and the API tokens tied to it stopped working right after. I need to either finish the conversion or roll it back because our sync job is failing now.

comments.message: I tried converting one of our old user accounts into a service account so our integration would stop counting against a paid seat. The wizard completed, but the account still appears as a standard member and the API tokens tied to it stopped working right after. I need to either finish the conversion or roll it back because our sync job is failing now.

Understood. A few checks: was the account originally created with password login or SSO, and do you see any status tag like "conversion pending" on the account details page? Also, are newly generated API tokens failing too, or only the older ones?
Originally SSO. There’s no conversion pending tag. Old and new tokens both return unauthorized, but the account still has the normal member badge.

Thanks. That combination points to the conversion job disabling interactive auth and token scopes before the account type update completes. I just reproduced the same behavior in our staging environment with an SSO-backed user, so this appears to be a product bug. I’ve escalated it and asked for a rollback on your account so API access can be restored. If you need the integration up sooner, create a fresh service account instead of converting this one; I realize that’s not ideal, but it should bypass the broken path.

subject: Knowledge base category permissions not applying
description: I reorganized our help center and made a category visible only to signed-in customers on the Enterprise plan. However, anonymous visitors can still open some articles directly if they have the URL. I need to know if I configured article permissions incorrectly or if this is expected behavior.

comments.message: The category is restricted, and most articles disappear from navigation when signed out. But if I paste a direct article link in an incognito window, a few of them still load.

Permissions on the category don't always override article-level visibility if those articles were previously set individually. Please open one of the exposed articles and check whether its visibility is still 'public' at the article level. If so, update it to inherit from category or explicitly restrict it. Reindexing can also take a few minutes after changes.
I checked one and it was indeed still marked public. I changed several manually, but there are dozens. Is there a bulk fix?

At the moment there isn't a bulk permission inheritance tool in the UI for existing articles. You would need to update them one by one or via API. I realize that's not ideal, but the exposure is due to article configuration overriding the category setting.

subject: Deleted rows reappearing after bulk import cleanup
description: I uploaded a corrected CSV to replace bad product records and then deleted the old rows in bulk. They disappeared at first, but this morning the deleted rows were back in the table with their previous values. It looks like some background sync restored them. I need to know whether the delete action is failing or if the import process is duplicating archived data.

comments.message: I uploaded a corrected CSV to replace bad product records and then deleted the old rows in bulk. They disappeared at first, but this morning the deleted rows were back in the table with their previous values. It looks like some background sync restored them.
Usually when rows come back like that it means they were not fully deleted and were only hidden by a filter. Please clear your browser cache and check again.
I already checked with another admin and the records are definitely back, with the same external IDs as the deleted rows. This doesn't seem browser-related.

Understood. I don't have tooling to inspect the sync history directly, but based on the external IDs it may be your nightly import upserting those rows again from the source file. Please disable the scheduled import and try deleting them once more. If they return after that, we'll need to investigate further.

subject: Les contacts créés via l'API n'apparaissent pas dans Mailchimp
description: Nous avons activé votre intégration Mailchimp pour pousser automatiquement nos nouveaux contacts marketing. Les contacts créés manuellement dans votre interface partent bien, mais ceux créés via votre API REST n'arrivent jamais dans Mailchimp. Ils ont pourtant bien l'opt-in à true et la même liste cible. J'aimerais savoir si l'intégration écoute tous les points d'entrée ou seulement les créations manuelles.

comments.message: Bonjour, les contacts créés via votre API n'apparaissent pas dans Mailchimp, alors que ceux saisis manuellement sont bien synchronisés. Est-ce une limitation connue ?
Bonjour, normalement non, tout devrait se synchroniser pareil. Pouvez-vous vérifier que vos contacts API ont bien une adresse e-mail valide et l'opt-in marketing activé ?
Oui, c'est bien le cas. J'ai comparé deux fiches quasi identiques, une créée à la main et une via API; seule la seconde ne part pas.

Merci. Dans ce cas il est possible que votre flux API utilise un indicateur de source exclu par la règle de synchronisation Mailchimp sur votre compte. Je n'ai pas la main pour voir cette configuration en détail depuis le support général, donc j'escalade vers notre équipe produit intégrations. Je joins des exemples d'ID de contacts pour qu'ils vérifient le déclencheur sur les créations API.

subject: Can’t transfer user ownership because the target admin is missing
description: I’m trying to transfer ownership of several managed user groups from one department admin to another before the original admin leaves the company tomorrow. The transfer flow says there is no eligible target admin, even though the replacement user is active and should have elevated rights. I need this resolved or escalated quickly because we can’t have orphaned user groups.

comments.message: The platform won’t let me transfer group ownership to the replacement admin. It says there is no eligible target, but the new person is active in the workspace.
Please ask the replacement admin to log out and back in. If that doesn’t work, clear the browser cache and try the transfer again.
We already tried that. I think the issue is that she has department admin but maybe not the specific permission needed to own those groups. Can you verify what role is required?

You’re right to question the permission level. Group ownership transfers usually require the target user to have the matching admin scope for those managed groups, not just general access. I can’t validate the entitlement matrix from this queue, so I’m escalating to our permissions team to confirm the exact role requirement and check whether there’s a backend inconsistency on the replacement account.

subject: QuickBooks payment sync failed and collections report is stale
description: Payments from QuickBooks stopped appearing in our collections report after last night's sync error. The integration panel shows an authentication warning, but only for one subsidiary connection, and now the report is missing all payments posted today. We need to know whether this can be fixed quickly or if we should manually export data for finance.

comments.message: The QuickBooks integration for our EMEA subsidiary threw an auth warning overnight. Since then, today's collections report has no new payments at all, including accounts that definitely paid this morning. US data may still be okay, but the combined report is wrong.

An authentication warning on one subsidiary connection can prevent new payment records from importing for that source, and consolidated reporting would then look incomplete. Have you already reconnected the EMEA QuickBooks account from the integrations page?
Yes, I reconnected it an hour ago. The warning cleared, but the report still hasn't picked up the missing payments and finance is asking for an ETA.

Reauth should restore future syncs, but it won't always backfill records missed during the failure window immediately. Because your collections report is still stale after the reconnect, I'm escalating this to our integrations team to verify whether a catch-up sync needs to be triggered. I'm also noting the reporting impact so they can advise whether finance should rely on a manual QuickBooks export for today's numbers.

subject: Payment receipt went to disabled mailbox and now I can't reset my admin login
description: Our AP team says the latest receipt never arrived, and I realized it was sent to a disabled shared mailbox from a former admin. I tried to log in with that admin account to update the billing email, but the password reset also goes to the disabled mailbox. We also need to confirm whether the card was charged twice, because AP sees two line items from your company on the statement. Can you help us regain billing access and verify the charges?

comments.message: Our AP team says the latest receipt never arrived, and I realized it was sent to a disabled shared mailbox from a former admin. I tried to log in with that admin account to update the billing email, but the password reset also goes to the disabled mailbox. We also need to confirm whether the card was charged twice, because AP sees two line items from your company on the statement. Can you help us regain billing access and verify the charges?
Please have your mail administrator re-enable the mailbox temporarily so you can receive the reset email. As for the charges, one may be a bank hold.
That mailbox belongs to a decommissioned tenant, so that’s not possible. And AP says both entries are settled, not pending.

Thanks for clarifying. I can see two settled transactions: one for the subscription renewal and one for an invoice retried after a timeout response, so this does look like a duplicate capture. I’m escalating a refund request for the duplicate charge. For access, since the old mailbox cannot be restored, I’ve sent you our billing ownership verification form so we can move the admin login and receipt notifications to an active address.

subject: Relatório de atividade não mostra novos usuários da filial
description: Eu administro os usuários da nossa conta e criei 14 pessoas novas para a filial de Curitiba na semana passada. Elas já conseguiram entrar na plataforma, mas quando puxo o relatório de atividade por departamento esses usuários não aparecem de jeito nenhum. Já revisei os filtros de data e de equipe. Preciso fechar um acompanhamento hoje e os números estão errados.

comments.message: Criei os usuários pelo painel de administração na terça e na quarta. Todos receberam convite e acessaram pelo menos uma vez. No relatório de atividade por departamento, a filial de Curitiba continua com o mesmo total antigo.

Olá! Obrigado por detalhar. Isso normalmente acontece quando os usuários são criados sem um departamento principal definido no perfil. Pode abrir Administração > Usuários, editar um dos usuários afetados e confirmar se o campo 'Departamento' está preenchido como 'Curitiba'? Depois disso, o relatório costuma atualizar em até 30 minutos.

Verifiquei agora. Em vários deles o departamento estava em branco, apesar de eu ter colocado o grupo correto na criação em massa. Corrigi 3 perfis e eles já apareceram no relatório, mas os outros 11 ainda não.

Perfeito, então identificamos a causa. O grupo de acesso não preenche automaticamente o campo de departamento no relatório. Recomendo atualizar os 11 perfis restantes ou usar a edição em massa para definir 'Departamento = Curitiba'. Após a sincronização, o relatório deve fechar corretamente. Se quiser, posso te passar o passo a passo da edição em massa.

subject: Training request for automation rules, but docs don't match our screen
description: I'm trying to teach our support leads how to use automation rules, and the knowledge base article shows options that aren't visible in our admin panel. I need a clear explanation I can pass on to the team, because right now they don't understand the difference between trigger conditions, schedule-based automations, and one-time bulk actions. Can you clarify this in plain language?

comments.message: I'm trying to teach our support leads how to use automation rules, and the knowledge base article shows options that aren't visible in our admin panel. I need a clear explanation I can pass on to the team, because right now they don't understand the difference between trigger conditions, schedule-based automations, and one-time bulk actions. Can you clarify this in plain language?

Sure — triggers run immediately when a record matches conditions, automations run on a time schedule or after a delay, and bulk actions are manual one-off updates you launch yourself. If the article doesn't match your screen, it's probably because you're on an older plan or a different admin experience.
That explanation is useful, but I still need to know why our admins don't see the 'Run test' option from the article. We're preparing a training session tomorrow.

The 'Run test' option should normally be there under automations, so you may want to clear cache or try another browser. If it's still missing, I'll need to escalate to our documentation team because the article may be outdated for your account version.

subject: Deleted admin account still appears as account owner
description: I removed a former employee from our instance two weeks ago, but her profile still shows as the account owner in the billing and security settings pages. I can’t transfer ownership because the dropdown errors out and says the user is not active. I’m a full admin and have already cleared browser cache, tried an incognito window, and confirmed she is fully deactivated under Users. This is blocking our audit review.

comments.message: A deleted admin still appears as account owner, and I can’t transfer ownership because the system says the user is not active.

You should be able to change account owner from Settings > Billing by selecting another active admin. If the previous owner is deactivated, just reactivate her briefly, transfer ownership, and deactivate her again.
That’s the problem: I can’t reactivate her because HR requires the account to remain disabled, and the transfer dropdown itself errors out before I can select anyone else.
In that case, please export your user list and re-import the admin users so the ownership field refreshes. That normally clears stale user data.

subject: Zmiana właściciela konta i brak dostępu do panelu admina
description: Poprzedni właściciel konta odszedł z firmy i zmieniliśmy główny kontakt administracyjny na mnie. Dostałem potwierdzenie zmiany, ale nadal nie mogę zalogować się do sekcji administracyjnej. Widzę tylko zwykły widok użytkownika.

comments.message: Próbowałem resetu hasła i ponownego logowania, ale uprawnienia się nie zmieniają. Czy możecie sprawdzić, czy rola została poprawnie przeniesiona?

Widzę zmianę właściciela konta w systemie rozliczeniowym, ale role dostępu w aplikacji nie zsynchronizowały się poprawnie. Nadałem Panu rolę administratora ręcznie i wymusiłem ponowne odświeżenie sesji.
Teraz panel admina już się otwiera. Czy poprzedni właściciel stracił dostęp?
Tak, poprzedni właściciel został zdezaktywowany i nie może się już logować. Dla bezpieczeństwa wylogowałem też wszystkie aktywne sesje powiązane z jego kontem.

subject: Zeitgesteuerter Erinnerungs-Workflow startet einen Tag zu früh
description: Wir nutzen eine Automatisierung, die Kunden 3 Tage vor Vertragsende erinnert. Seit diesem Monat werden die Mails aber schon 4 Tage vorher verschickt. Das ist bei mehreren Accounts passiert. Ich habe die Regel kontrolliert und dort steht weiterhin eindeutig "3 Tage vorher". Woher kann die Verschiebung kommen?

comments.message: Die Bedingung im Workflow lautet auf 3 Tage vor dem Enddatum, aber die E-Mails gehen einen Tag zu früh raus. Unsere Zeitzone im Account ist Berlin.

Danke. Bei zeitgesteuerten Automationen ist oft entscheidend, ob das Datumsfeld nur ein Datum oder Datum plus Uhrzeit enthält. Wenn das Feld intern auf Mitternacht UTC gespeichert wird, kann es je nach Zeitzone so wirken, als ob die Erinnerung einen Kalendertag früher läuft.
Das Feld kommt aus einer API und enthält tatsächlich einen UTC-Zeitstempel 00:00:00Z.

Dann passt das Bild. In Berlin kann das je nach Sommerzeit zur Verschiebung führen, sodass die Berechnung im Scheduler effektiv einen Tag früher landet. Als kurzfristigen Workaround können Sie den Workflow auf 2 Tage und eine feste Versandzeit umstellen oder das Enddatum ohne Uhrzeit in ein separates Feld schreiben. Für eine saubere Prüfung der Scheduler-Logik habe ich den Fall an unser Automatisierungs-Team eskaliert.

subject: Onboarding-Workflow bleibt bei importierten Kontakten stecken
description: Ich habe heute rund 800 Kontakte importiert, die eigentlich automatisch in unseren Onboarding-Workflow gehen sollten. Bei etwa der Hälfte ist der erste Schritt ausgeführt worden, bei der anderen Hälfte steht nur "wartet auf Eintrittsbedingung", obwohl alle Kontakte im selben Import waren. Ich kann keinen offensichtlichen Unterschied erkennen. Bitte helfen Sie mir weiter.

comments.message: Der Workflow soll starten, wenn das Feld "Lifecycle-Phase" auf "Neukunde" gesetzt ist. Im Import war dieser Wert für alle Zeilen vorhanden, aber trotzdem sind viele Kontakte nicht eingetreten.
Importe sind für Workflow-Auslöser generell nicht geeignet. Automationen funktionieren normalerweise nur bei manuellen Änderungen im System.
Das stimmt so nicht ganz, weil bei ungefähr 400 Kontakten der Workflow ja gestartet ist. Außerdem haben wir das in den letzten Monaten genauso genutzt.

Verstehe. Dann liegt es möglicherweise an einer zusätzlichen Eintrittsbeschränkung, etwa "nur einmal pro Datensatz" oder "nur wenn Feld von leer auf Wert wechselt". Bitte prüfen Sie im Trigger, ob der Workflow nur auf Änderungen reagiert statt auf den Endwert. Wenn Sie möchten, kann ich den Fall an den technischen Support übergeben, weil das gemischte Verhalten bei demselben Import ungewöhnlich ist.

subject: Deleted user still appears in API exports and group membership counts
description: I removed several former employees from the admin panel, but they still appear in our API export and inflate group membership totals used by our audit script. Some records look soft-deleted, others are inactive, and one account still has an API key attached. I need to understand the lifecycle states and make sure only the right admins can perform permanent removals because this is getting messy.

comments.message: Our audit compares active user counts by group. After deleting five users in the UI, GET /groups/{id}/members still returns them for two groups, and the user export includes deleted_at for some but not all.
Once a user is deleted, they should disappear completely from groups and exports within a few minutes. If they still show up, please clear your cache and rerun the call.
This is server-side API output, not a browser cache issue. Also, one of the users cannot be hard-deleted because the UI says they still own an API key and imported files.

Understood. I oversimplified earlier. In our system, inactive, soft-deleted, and permanently deleted users behave differently in exports and membership endpoints, especially when owned artifacts still exist. A user with active API keys or imported assets may be blocked from permanent deletion until those objects are revoked or transferred. Soft-deleted users can still appear in some audit endpoints unless you filter for active=true. Permanent removal is typically restricted to higher-level admins for that reason. If you want, I can escalate this with your account IDs so we can confirm which records are stuck behind owned artifacts.

subject: Need least-privilege service account for user export and record correction
description: I'm trying to set up a service account that can export user data, detect bad records, and correct a few profile fields through the API, but I don't want it to have full super admin rights. Right now my token can export the directory but cannot update the affected users, and when I promoted the account further it gained access to datasets it should not see. I need guidance on the right combination of permissions for user edits versus data access.

comments.message: The use case is pretty narrow: list users, update department and manager fields, and maybe deactivate users who leave. We do not want the automation account to read customer datasets or edit dashboards.

In that case, give the service account a custom admin role with user.read and user.write permissions, plus lifecycle management if it needs to deactivate users. Data export of the user directory is treated as user data, but dataset access is governed separately under data-management scopes, so the account should not need those if it only touches user profiles.
I tried something similar, but PATCH on manager fields still returns forbidden while department updates succeed.

Manager hierarchy changes are often protected by a separate org-structure permission even when basic profile edits are allowed. Check whether your custom role includes org hierarchy edit rights; if not, that would explain why department updates work but manager changes fail. If you send the role JSON, I can point out the missing privilege.

subject: Audit report still shows deactivated users
description: I ran a user activity report to review who is still accessing the platform, but deactivated employees are still appearing in the results. I deactivated them from User Administration last week. I need to know whether the report is wrong, delayed, or if I missed another step. Also, I need wording I can give our HR coordinator so she understands why deactivated people are still listed.

comments.message: Three users were deactivated on Monday. Today they still appear in our 'Active users by last login' report. The status column says inactive, but the rows are still there. We expected them to disappear completely.

What you’re seeing is normal if the report is historical rather than filtered to currently active accounts. Deactivating users stops future access, but reporting can still retain their records so you can audit past activity. If you only want current users, add a filter for User Status = Active.
That helps. Is there a delay before deactivation affects scheduled reports?

Usually the user status change is reflected quickly, but some scheduled reports use the last processed reporting snapshot, so there can be a short lag before the next run. For HR, you can say: deactivated users remain visible in audit reports for historical tracking, but they can no longer sign in once their account is inactive.

subject: Dúvida sobre upsert via API e chaves duplicadas no CRM
description: Estamos integrando leads do nosso formulário com a API e usamos e-mail como chave de upsert. O problema é que já existem contatos antigos com o mesmo e-mail em múltiplos registros por causa de migrações anteriores. Quando fazemos o upsert, às vezes um registro é atualizado, às vezes outro, e em alguns casos parece criar conflito na nossa base espelhada. Preciso de uma estratégia segura para saneamento desses dados e para evitar comportamento imprevisível da API.

comments.message: Hoje temos cerca de 4 mil e-mails duplicados e não dá para corrigir tudo manualmente. Existe algum endpoint para identificar qual ID a API vai escolher no upsert?

Olá! Quando há duplicidade na chave usada para upsert, o comportamento pode ficar indefinido dependendo do endpoint e da ordem interna de resolução. O ideal é primeiro normalizar os dados, consolidando os contatos duplicados, e só depois manter o upsert por e-mail.
Entendi, mas precisamos continuar sincronizando enquanto limpamos os dados. Qual seria a abordagem menos arriscada?

A abordagem mais segura é parar de usar e-mail como chave temporariamente e passar a persistir o id da plataforma no seu sistema após a primeira criação. Para a limpeza, recomendo exportar os contatos com e-mails repetidos via API, agrupar por e-mail, definir um registro canônico por regras de negócio e então mesclar ou desativar os demais. Se você quiser, posso abrir uma escalada para verificarmos se a funcionalidade de merge em massa está habilitada na sua conta.

subject: Dashboard filters reset every morning
description: I manage reporting for our sales team, and for the last four days the dashboard filters I save on our pipeline view keep resetting overnight. I set owner, region, and date range, save the view, and it looks fine until the next morning when it goes back to the default filters. This is happening to me in Chrome on macOS, and one of my coworkers saw it once in Edge on Windows too. I already cleared cache and signed out/in, but it still happens.

comments.message: Our saved dashboard view keeps losing its filters by the next day. It seems to happen overnight or after inactivity. Can you help figure out what's causing it?

Thanks for the detail. To narrow this down, can you confirm whether this happens on all saved views or only one specific view, and whether the view was originally created by you or duplicated from someone else?
It happens on two saved views that I created myself. I tested a brand new view yesterday and that one also reset this morning.

I reproduced similar behavior in a test workspace when the saved view includes a relative date filter like 'this quarter.' Our engineering notes show a bug where relative-date filters are not persisting after the nightly index refresh. As a workaround, please switch the date filter to a fixed custom range and resave the view. I've linked your workspace to the existing bug report so we can notify you when it's fixed.

subject: Need VAT number added and billing admin switched
description: Our invoices are missing our VAT number, which is a compliance issue for our accounting team. At the same time, our old controller should no longer be the billing administrator because she retired. Please update the tax details, move billing admin rights to me, and confirm whether past invoices can be reissued.

comments.message: Can you add VAT ID GB23988104 to our billing profile and future invoices? Our retired controller, Anne Wilkes, is still the billing admin, so I also need that role changed to me. If possible, we'd like the March and April invoices reissued with the VAT number included.

I can update the tax profile for future invoices once ownership is confirmed, and I can initiate a billing admin transfer from Anne to you using a domain verification process. As for past invoices, whether they can be reissued depends on your region and invoice status, but I'll check.
Okay, I've completed the domain verification email. Can you confirm if the admin change went through and whether the old invoices can be corrected?

Yes, your billing admin transfer is now complete and the VAT ID has been added to the account for future billing. I also requested corrected March and April invoices from our finance operations team; they are not generated instantly, but if approved, they'll be emailed to you within 2 business days.

subject: Can't change account owner after admin left
description: I’m trying to transfer ownership of our workspace to our new operations manager because the previous owner left the company last week. I updated her role to admin, but the option to make her the account owner is grayed out. We also noticed some settings pages now throw an error when we try to open them, so I’m not sure if the two issues are related.

comments.message: The former owner’s email was deactivated yesterday, and now we can’t access Billing or Security settings. When I go to Team > Members, the new admin is there, but “Transfer ownership” is disabled.

Thanks for the details. This usually happens when the current owner account is still the only verified super admin and there’s a pending identity check on the replacement admin. Please ask the new admin to log out, log back in, and confirm her email address if she hasn’t already. Also clear the browser cache before reopening the settings pages.
She re-logged in and her email is verified. The settings pages still error out with a 500 message, and ownership transfer is still unavailable.

I checked your workspace and can confirm the transfer is blocked because the current owner account is inactive and the workspace has a stuck permission sync job. I’ve escalated this to our account management team to reassign ownership manually, and I’ve attached the troubleshooting notes about the 500 errors for engineering. You should receive an update by email once the sync job is cleared.

subject: Zapier-Integration überträgt keine Anhänge aus Formularen
description: Ich habe einen Zap eingerichtet, der neue Formulareinträge aus Ihrer Plattform in unser Backoffice schickt. Alle Felder kommen an, aber Datei-Anhänge fehlen komplett. In Zapier sehe ich nur leere Werte bei den Upload-Feldern. Können Sie sagen, ob Anhänge in der Integration unterstützt werden?

comments.message: Es geht um unser Bewerbungsformular. Lebensläufe und Portfolio-Dateien werden im Trigger nicht mitgegeben, obwohl sie im Datensatz vorhanden sind.

Danke für die genaue Beschreibung. Bei unserer Zapier-Integration werden Datei-Felder nicht als Binärdatei übertragen, sondern als signierte Download-URLs. Wenn Zapier bei Ihnen leere Werte anzeigt, ist meistens das Formular-Feld als 'intern' markiert oder die App hat keine Berechtigung auf geschützte Anhänge.
Die Felder sind tatsächlich als intern markiert, weil wir sie nicht im Kundenportal anzeigen wollen. Kann ich das ändern, ohne alles öffentlich zu machen?

Ja, das geht. 'Intern' und 'im Portal sichtbar' sind getrennte Einstellungen. Lassen Sie das Feld im Portal verborgen, aber aktivieren Sie in der Zapier-Integration unter 'Erweiterte Feldfreigabe' den Zugriff auf interne Upload-Felder. Danach sollten im Trigger signierte URLs erscheinen, die Ihr Zap weiterverarbeiten kann.
